label: Deep audit + 14 bug fixes
topWin: Deep 4-agent parallel audit discovered and fixed 4 critical game-breaking bugs that had been shipping undetected.
topGap: No formal TASK_BOARD velocity — session was redirected to refinement; Speedrun/Gauntlet achievements remain 4 sessions overdue.
ignisNote: A dedicated refinement session with multi-agent parallel auditing found critical bugs that feature-focused sessions missed — scheduling periodic audit sessions is high-leverage for game quality.
